Footer.tagline: Aparthotel in Boulogne-Billancourt. A few nights or several months.
Footer.rights: Boulogne Résidence Hôtel. All rights reserved.

Home.heroTitle: An aparthotel in Boulogne. For work, for Paris.
Home.heroSubtitle: 22 rooms and studios, 5 minutes from Marcel Sembat metro. For a night, a week or several months.
Home.whyTitle: Three things to know before you book.
Home.why1Title: Stay as long as you need.
Home.why1Body: One night for Roland-Garros, three for a client trip, two months for a long assignment. Studios with a fully equipped kitchenette to cook whenever you like, classic rooms for short stays. Lower rates from 3 nights.
Home.why2Title: All of Paris within reach. And the Bois on your doorstep.
Home.why2Body: Marcel Sembat metro (line 9) is 400 metres away — a 5-minute walk. The Eiffel Tower in 15 minutes by metro, the Champs-Élysées in 20. The Bois de Boulogne starts at the corner. You pay Boulogne, you live Paris.
Home.why3Title: The stadium, the arena, the festival. Always on foot.
Home.why3Body: Roland-Garros 1.7 km away. Parc des Princes 1.2 km. La Seine Musicale 1.4 km. Longchamp racecourse 3 km. Walk home after the concert, the match, the final — no overpriced ride-hailing, no last metro missed.
Home.who1Body: Your clients are in Boulogne, Issy, La Défense or the 16th. You arrive Monday evening, leave Thursday morning. A studio with a desk, Wi-Fi that holds a video call, a kitchenette so you don't eat out every night. French- and English-speaking reception, monthly business invoicing, 24/7 access.
Home.who2Body: You're coming from Lyon, Bordeaux, Brussels. You want to see Paris without paying central-Paris prices. Direct line 9 to Châtelet in 25 minutes, the Bois de Boulogne round the corner for the Sunday run, a kitchenette for the kids' breakfast. Restaurants and a market 3 minutes away — the living Boulogne, not the postcard one.
Home.who3Title: For the tournament, the match, the concert.
Home.who3Body: Roland-Garros, a PSG final, a concert at La Seine Musicale, races at Longchamp, the Foire de Paris, a show at Porte de Versailles. Everything is on foot or 10 minutes away. Leave the car parked, forget the packed transport home. Walk back after the whistle.
Home.roomsIntro: Five room types on the lower floors, three studios with an equipped kitchenette higher up. All air-conditioned, with a safe, a desk and free Wi-Fi.
Home.room4Pitch: Two separate beds, for colleagues or friends.
Home.direct1Body: No platform commission passed on. The public price, booked direct.
Home.direct2Body: Change your dates up to 24 h before arrival on flexible rates — your terms, not a platform's.
Home.direct3Title: A real person on the line.
Home.direct3Body: +33 1 49 10 05 45 — for groups, long stays and questions a form can't handle.

Rooms.heroTitle: Your place in Boulogne. At your own pace.
Rooms.heroSubtitle: 22 rooms and studios across six floors. Comfortable rooms on the lower floors, studios with an equipped kitchenette higher up. Choose the format that fits your stay.
Rooms.overviewBody1: On the lower floors, five room categories for short stays — from the compact format to the business room with a bathtub. Higher up, three studio categories with an equipped kitchenette, for those who stay longer and prefer to dine in.
Rooms.overviewBody2: All our places share the same essentials: high-speed Wi-Fi, air conditioning, a desk, a private bathroom, a safe, a smart TV. What changes from one category to the next is the size, the bed type, and whether or not there's a kitchenette.
Rooms.overviewSignature: Book direct, and you move up a category if a higher one is free when you arrive.
Rooms.ctaSubtitle: The best rate is here, guaranteed. And if a higher category is free when you arrive, you move up.

Neighborhood.heroTitle: Paris, only better. Four minutes away.
Neighborhood.heroSubtitle: The metro four minutes away, the Eiffel Tower twenty, the Bois at the end of the street. Boulogne is Paris when you want it, calm when you need it.
Neighborhood.heroPhoto: The neighbourhood — a Boulogne street at dawn
Neighborhood.livingBody1: Paris, but better. Boulogne is the address you keep to yourself: the metro four minutes away, the Eiffel Tower twenty, and every head office that matters within walking distance. A city where you can breathe — the Bois, the Seine, markets, and that density of good addresses you find in Paris (often without the queues). Paris when you want it. Boulogne when you want to catch your breath.
Neighborhood.livingBody2: In the morning, you grab a coffee to go and walk to the metro. In the evening, you dine on a street where no one takes photos. And then you sleep.
Neighborhood.aroundIntro: Five kilometres around the hotel: a Grand Slam, a Champions League stadium, an international stage, three racecourses. Front row, on foot.
Neighborhood.mapCaption: The 12 places, on foot or a few minutes away.
Neighborhood.bandPhoto: Full-width band — a view over the Seine or the Bois
Neighborhood.addressesIntro: Our addresses, not the guidebook's. Not the queue outside the Marais, not the table everyone photographs. The places where we eat, where we grab a coffee between meetings, where we send the people we like. Five to ten minutes on foot. Up to you.
Neighborhood.addressesNote: List kept up to date. Got a good address to add? Tell us at reception.
Neighborhood.transportTitle: How you arrive. How you get around.
Neighborhood.personasTitle: Three good reasons to be here.
Neighborhood.persona1Body: You're here to see Paris, but without the queue at the Eiffel Tower or the 14 m² on a busy street. You take line 9, you're at Châtelet in twenty-five minutes. In the morning, your coffee is on a street where people actually work. In the evening, you walk home from the concert.
Neighborhood.persona2Title: The corridor between Paris and La Défense.
Neighborhood.persona2Body: Carrefour, Renault, TF1, Boursorama, La Défense, Issy. Your clients are within a five-kilometre radius. You sleep where it simplifies the commute, you eat where there's a real restaurant, you run in the Bois before the first call.
Neighborhood.persona3Body: Roland-Garros, the PSG match, the concert at La Seine Musicale, the races at Longchamp, the final at La Défense Arena. You want to walk to the stadium and walk home. That's exactly where we come in.
Neighborhood.finalSubtitle: Choose your dates, we'll handle the rest.
Neighborhood.finalPhone: A question about the neighbourhood or a specific event? <phone>+33 1 49 10 05 45</phone> — Monday to Friday, 7 am–10 pm.

Business.heroTitle: A Paris address for your people.
Business.heroSubtitle: 22 rooms and studios in Boulogne-Billancourt, designed for short trips as much as extended stays. The metro four minutes away, the Eiffel Tower twenty, and all the major head offices within walking distance.
Business.whyTitle: A setting that makes the difference on stays that matter.
Business.whyBody: Your people come to work. Our job is to give them a setting that lets them do it well. Quiet at night, functional by day. Equipped studios for stays that stretch out, comfortable rooms for those leaving the next morning. Without the bland routine of business chains, without the improvisation of short-term rentals.
Business.whySignature: One team in front of you. Reachable. Responsive.
Business.conditionsTitle: Suited to your need. Discussed with you.
Business.conditionsIntro: No standard grid. A conversation, terms, a contract. The details are discussed case by case.
Business.conditionsNote: To discuss a volume, a frequency, a framework agreement: the phone works best.
Business.mapTitle: Your clients, within a walk or a metro ride.
Business.mapIntro: Within ten kilometres of the hotel, most of France's head offices and the business hubs of western Paris.
Business.formSubtitle: A few details. We'll get back to you within 24 business hours.
Business.formSuccessBody: We'll get back to you within 24 business hours.
Business.finalSubtitle: Three ways to start the conversation.
Business.finalDevisBody: A few details, an answer within 24 business hours.
Business.finalCallBody: Monday to Friday, a real person on the line.
Business.finalVisitBody: By appointment, we show you the units and discuss your terms in a calm setting.

Direct.heroTitle: The best price. And everything that comes with it.
Direct.heroSubtitle: The lowest rate is here, guaranteed. But that's only the start. The real difference begins at booking and continues throughout your stay.
Direct.bandPhoto: Full-width band — a room ready at dusk
Direct.engagementsTitle: Three touches that make the difference.
Direct.engagementsIntro: Beyond the rate, these are our concrete commitments to guests who book direct.
Direct.tableIntro: An honest comparison. No aggression, no cliché.
Direct.tableNote: An honest comparison. Platforms still have their uses. But the best of the hotel is here.
Direct.bookingBody: The lowest rate is waiting for you. So are the commitments. And our team is reachable by phone if you need help or advice.
Direct.bookingNote: A question first? Call us at <phone>+33 1 49 10 05 45</phone>.
Direct.faqTitle: What we get asked about direct booking.
Direct.finalSubtitle: The rate is here. So is the care.
